description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house with a complex, multi-faceted hip roof and several prominent chimneys. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, complemented by darker trim and a dark gray roof. The front features a covered porch with multiple arches and steps leading up to the main entry, supported by columns. Several bay windows project from the structure, adding architectural interest and increasing interior light. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped in vertical sets and others as single units. The house sits on a rectangular plot of grass, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting.
description: A large, two-story beige house with a dark hip roof, covered porch, and bay windows, set on a grassy lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with arches, main entry steps, and bay windows on the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back wall with multiple chimneys and fewer windows, showing a simpler facade.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the prominent bay window projection and the hip roof's complexity.
description_view_3: Angled view of the front and side, emphasizing the porch, entry steps, and multiple window arrangements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay windows and grouped vertical sets
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with arches, steps, columns, and a central main door
